Whizbang CLI - Command-line tool for Whizbang
Version 0.1.0

Usage: whizbang <command> [options]

Commands:
  schema          Manage database schemas
  migrate         Migrate from Marten/Wolverine to Whizbang

Options:
  --help, -h      Show this help message
  --version, -v   Show version information

Run 'whizbang <command> --help' for more information on a command.

Migration Commands

Usage: whizbang migrate <subcommand> [options]

Subcommands:
  analyze              Analyze project for Marten/Wolverine patterns
  apply                Apply transformations to migrate code
  status               Show migration progress

Options:
  --project, -p <path>  Project directory (default: current directory)
  --dry-run, -n         Preview changes without modifying files (apply only)
  --guided, -g          Interactive mode: approve each file (apply only)

Examples:
  whizbang migrate analyze
  whizbang migrate analyze --project ./src/MyApp
  whizbang migrate apply --dry-run
  whizbang migrate apply --guided
  whizbang migrate apply --project ./src/MyApp
  whizbang migrate status

Migration Commands

Usage: whizbang migrate <subcommand> [options]

Subcommands:
  analyze              Analyze project for Marten/Wolverine patterns
  apply                Apply transformations to migrate code
  status               Show migration progress

Options:
  --project, -p <path>  Project directory (default: current directory)
  --dry-run, -n         Preview changes without modifying files (apply only)
  --guided, -g          Interactive mode: approve each file (apply only)

Examples:
  whizbang migrate analyze
  whizbang migrate analyze --project ./src/MyApp
  whizbang migrate apply --dry-run
  whizbang migrate apply --guided
  whizbang migrate apply --project ./src/MyApp
  whizbang migrate status
